channel.title: feature on Core Dump
channel.description: Recent content in feature on Core Dump

item.title: Wrong Tool For The Job: Concurrent Queues with Aerospike
item.description: If all you have is a hammer . . . Organizational choices and system architecture sometimes forces you to use sub-optimal tools for a problem. In fact, this is part of the challenge that work throws at you - having to retrofit or abuse tools to get the job done. If you always had the right set of tools, what fun would life be? This is one such problem. The Problem We had an antiquated use case which allowed customers to create a deferred list of jobs.
